query_name: 検証_ビンゴマス達成状況_デジ戦ver
query_string:
with target_customer as (
  select
    distinct
    dtb_customer_id as customer_id
    , created_app as registered_date
  from
    _l1_mysql_hp.customers
  where
    substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2026-01-27'
)

, order_log as (
    select
      t0.customer_id
      , t0.id as order_id
      , substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) as business_date
      , purchased_datetime
      , max(if(t2.rate in (1,2), 1, 0)) as review_flag
      , max(if(regexp_like(product_name, '足つぼ') and cast(regexp_extract(product_name, '([0-9]+)') as integer) >= 15, 1, 0)) as foot_flag
      , max(if(total_amount_of_nomination_fee > 0.0, 1, 0)) as nomination_flag
      , max(if(product_name in ('マットレス', 'Cool プレミアムマットレス'), 1, 0)) as premiummatt_flag
      , max(if(cast(substr(t0.treatment_start_datetime, 12, 2) as integer) in (12,13,14,15,16,17,18) and holiday_type is null and business_dow not in ('土', '日'), 1, 0)) as daytime_flag
      , max(if(total_amount_of_treatment_minutes >= 90, 1, 0)) as over90_flag
      , max(if(t4.reservation_id is not null, 1, 0)) as app_reserve_flag
    from
      _l1_mysql_pos.orders as t0
    left join
      (select distinct order_id, product_name from _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail) as t1 on t0.id = t1.order_id
    left join
      _l1_mysql_hp.reviews as t2 on t0.id = t2.order_id
    left join
      _integration_datamart.mst_datetime as t3 on substr(t0.registered_business_date, 1, 10) = t3.business_date
    left join
      (select distinct reservation_id from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_reserve where substr(td_time_string(event_unixtime, 'd!', 'jst'), 1, 10) >= '2024-11-18') as t4 on t0.reservation_id = t4.reservation_id
    where
      substr(t0.purchased_datetime, 1, 10) >= '2025-11-17' and substr(t0.purchased_datetime, 1, 10) <= '2026-01-27'
      and total_amount_of_treatment_minutes > 0
    group by
      1,2,3,4
)

, merged as (
  select
    t0.customer_id
    , order_id
    , business_date
    , review_flag
    , foot_flag
    , nomination_flag
    , premiummatt_flag
    , daytime_flag
    , over90_flag
    , app_reserve_flag
    , if(lead(purchased_datetime) over (partition by t0.customer_id order by order_id) is not null, 1) as f2_flag
    , date_diff('day', date(substr(registered_date, 1, 10)), date(business_date)) as registered_diff
  from
    target_customer as t0
  left join
    order_log as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
       and t0.registered_date <= t1.purchased_datetime
)

select
  count(distinct if(premiummatt_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "Pマットレス"
  , count(distinct if(review_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "レビュー評価"
  , count(distinct if(foot_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "足つぼ"
  , count(distinct if(nomination_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "TP指名"
  , count(distinct if(f2_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "2回目施術"
  , count(distinct if(app_reserve_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "APP予約"
  , count(distinct if(daytime_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "平日12-18時"
  , 'ダミー' as "初回ログイン"
  , count(distinct if(over90_flag = 1, customer_id)) as "90分以上"
from
  merged
